ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set the menu style - 'minimal' shows icons only in one line
ast.target: 设置菜单样式 - 'minimal' 仅在一行中显示图标

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose between highlighting with inline CSS or CSS classes. Please note that there are pros and cons to both choices. Inline CSS will keep you from being reliant on external CSS files if you choose to export your notes. CSS classes are more flexible and easier to customize.
ast.target: 选择使用内联 CSS 还是 CSS 类进行高亮。请注意，两种选择各有利弊。如果您选择导出笔记，内联 CSS 将使您无需依赖外部 CSS 文件。CSS 类更灵活，更易于自定义。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normally, new highlights overwrite old ones. Turn this off to keep previous highlights when highlighting. You will have to clear highlights manually when changing their color.
ast.target: 通常，新的高亮会覆盖旧的。关闭此选项可在高亮时保留之前的高亮。更改颜色时，您需要手动清除高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create new highlight colors by providing a color name and using the color picker to set the hex code value. Don't forget to save the color before exiting the color picker. Drag and drop the highlight color to change the order for your highlighter component.
ast.target: 通过提供颜色名称并使用颜色选择器设置十六进制代码值来创建新的高亮颜色。退出颜色选择器前别忘了保存颜色。拖放高亮颜色可更改高亮组件的顺序。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 要清除的额外 CSS 选择器

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Color HEX: Click off color picker to update
ast.target: 颜色 HEX：点击颜色选择器外部以更新

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 画笔：缺少 HEX 代码

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add atleast 1 color to showcase different styles
ast.target: 至少添加 1 种颜色以展示不同样式
